title: cyclobalanopsis lineata var. grandifolia
intro: Cyclobalanopsis lineata var. grandifolia, also known as the Chinese sweet chestnut or Chinese chestnut, is a deciduous tree species in the family Fagaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Cyclobalanopsis lineata var. grandifolia include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the tree are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote health and well-being.
